data.name: nUDImportGCDlyP94.ToolTip
data.value: Insert G4: delay in seconds before next command

data.name: nUDImportGCDlyP93.ToolTip
data.value: Insert G4: delay in seconds before next command

data.name: btnGCPWMZero.ToolTip
data.value: Move pen down, pen touches paper

data.name: nUDImportGCPWMZero.ToolTip
data.value: Set S value for zero position. Subroutine P91

data.name: btnGCPWMDown.ToolTip
data.value: Move pen down, to press pen on paper

data.name: nUDImportGCDlyDown.ToolTip
data.value: Delay in sec. after applying s value

data.name: nUDImportGCPWMDown.ToolTip
data.value: Set S value for down position. Subroutine P92

data.name: nUDImportGCDlyUp.ToolTip
data.value: Delay in sec. after applying s value

data.name: nUDImportGCPWMUp.ToolTip
data.value: Set S value for up position. Subroutine P90

data.name: NudDevicePlotterZP94.ToolTip
data.value: Set Z value for down position

data.name: NudDevicePlotterZP93.ToolTip
data.value: Set Z value for up position

data.name: NudDevicePlotterZDown.ToolTip
data.value: Set Z value for down position

data.name: NudDevicePlotterZUp.ToolTip
data.value: Set Z value for up position

data.name: BtnFill.ToolTip
data.value: Setup hatch fill for closed shapes

data.name: BtnSplit.ToolTip
data.value: Split path to insert a subroutine

data.name: BtnNoise.ToolTip
data.value: Convert straight lines to wobbly lines

data.name: CbDepthControl.ToolTip
data.value: Variates the S or Z value depending on pen-width

data.name: LblNoiseInfo.Text
data.value: Modify straight lines to get wobbly lines

data.name: LblSplitInfo.Text
data.value: Split path to insert a subroutine e.g. for brush fresh up
